mapper.select: SELECT bg.id, bg.group_code, bg.group_name, bg.created_at, bg.created_by, bg.updated_at, bg.updated_by, bg.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b WHERE b.group_id = bg.id AND b.deleted = 0) AS board_count FROM board_group bg WHERE bg.deleted = 0 ORDER BY bg.id ASC

SELECT bg.id, bg.group_code, bg.group_name, bg.created_at, bg.created_by, bg.updated_at, bg.updated_by, bg.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b WHERE b.group_id = bg.id AND b.deleted = 0) AS board_count FROM board_group bg WHERE bg.id = #{id} AND bg.deleted = 0

SELECT bg.id, bg.group_code, bg.group_name, bg.created_at, bg.created_by, bg.updated_at, bg.updated_by, bg.deleted, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board b WHERE b.group_id = bg.id AND b.deleted = 0) AS board_count FROM board_group bg WHERE bg.group_code = #{groupCode} AND bg.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_group ( group_code, group_name, created_at, created_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{groupCode}, #{groupName}, NOW(), #{createdBy}, 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE board_group SET group_name = #{groupName}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE board_group SET deleted = 1, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{deletedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
